payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Small white tabletop lamp with a scalloped fabric lampshade and visible stitched trim, white/ivory textured ceramic base with decorative detailing and a turquoise object at the base; lower-left of the lamp is cropped/partial in the image; estimated height ~30–45 cm and approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
